title: Department Manager Vacancy at DMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at DMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!
